examples: The LDH disappeared 2 bands, 6 bands, 2 bands and 1 band in muscle, hepatopancreas, heart and branchiae respectively.
The LDH disappeared 2 bands, 6 bands, 2 bands and 1 band in muscle, hepatopancreas, heart and branchiae respectively and appeared 1 new band in hepatopancreas of the disease shrimp.
